calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JONATHAN VAKNIN, Esq. (Tel: 415-851-5297) specially appearing for plaintiff/judgment creditor Unifund CCR Partners;
Defendant/judgment debtor ADRIANA MARTINS present in pro per.

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's claim of exemption is granted in part. The Sheriff shall remit the $727.25 or other funds he/she is holding to the judgment creditor. In addition, the judgment debtor shall remit $100 per pay period ($200/month) to service the debt.

Order signed. Copies of signed order are mailed to parties and Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per month. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-02-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Set For Trial On May-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
